title: Reach mild — linked HEC-RAS unsteady reach-only (constant Q, known stage DS)

parity_program.notes: Reach-only gate: constant Q=1000 cfs, DS stage 30.51 ft at RM 20.0. Terminal WSEL ±0.05 ft vs HEC-RAS Plan 02 HDF (measured max |Δ| ≈ 0.024 ft).

scope.notes: Eight cross sections (RM 20.535–20.0), open channel only (no culvert).

linked_project.notes: Eight open-channel XS (RM 20.535–20.0, no culvert); DS stage 30.51 ft.

stream1d.notes: g01 geometry (stations, Manning, bank stations); u02 BCs; steady warm-start IC; theta from plan.

reference.notes: Refresh from plan HDF: scripts/run_ras_reference.py --scenario scenarios/reach_mild_unsteady_linked.json (Windows recommended).
